faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Hempstead range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of the colony, location accessibility, and complexity of the removal. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Hempstead home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Hempstead and Long Island. Most bee removals are completed within 2-4 hours, though larger colonies or difficult-to-access locations may require additional time. We prioritize urgent situations involving allergies or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use safe, eco-friendly methods to remove bees without harsh chemicals that could harm your family, pets, or landscaping. We also recommend humane relocation when possible, working with local beekeepers to preserve these important pollinators while protecting your home.

faqs.question: Do you remove all types of bees and wasps in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle all bee and wasp species common to Long Island, including honeybees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, yellow jackets, hornets, and paper wasps. Each species requires different removal techniques, and our experienced team has the expertise to safely eliminate any stinging insect problem in your Hempstead property.
